onboarding.title: Welcome to CRM
onboarding.subtitle: Track your contacts, deals, and activities
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: We've added 3 contacts, 3 deals, and 3 activities so you can see how it works.

steps.title: Add contacts
steps.description: Add people you're working with. Just a name is enough to start.

steps.title: Track deals
steps.description: Create deals and move them through your pipeline — Lead, Proposal, Won, or Lost.

steps.title: Use your AI agent
steps.description: Ask your agent to add contacts, log calls, or check your pipeline.

reference.overview: A minimalist CRM for tracking contacts, deals, and activities. The pipeline board is the center of everything.

concepts.name: Contacts
concepts.description: People you work with. Name, email, company — that's it.

concepts.name: Deals
concepts.description: Opportunities moving through Lead → Proposal → Won/Lost.

concepts.name: Activities
concepts.description: Calls, emails, meetings, and notes tied to contacts and deals.

prompts: Add a contact: Jane Smith, jane@example.com, works at Acme Corp
Create a deal: Website redesign, $15,000, contact Jane Smith
Log a call with Jane about the website deal
Show me all deals in the proposal stage
What's the total value of my pipeline?
Move the Acme deal to won
tips: Deals are the center — the pipeline kanban is your home screen
Activities create a timeline for each contact and deal
Company is just a text field on contacts — no separate entity to manage

deals.title: No deals yet
deals.description: Create your first deal to start building your pipeline.
deals.suggestedPrompt: Create a deal: First opportunity, $10,000, lead stage

contacts.title: No contacts yet
contacts.description: Add your first contact to get started.
contacts.suggestedPrompt: Add a contact: Jane Smith, jane@example.com, Acme Corp

activities.title: No activities yet
activities.description: Log your first call, email, or meeting.
activities.suggestedPrompt: Log a call with Jane about the website deal
